recalls.Description: This recall involves Huffy 12-volt children's ride-on Tonka Dump Trucks, models 17362 and 17323. The ride-on trucks are yellow and black with "Tonka" labels on the front and side of the truck. The ride-on truck measures 45 inches long, 32 inches wide and 24 inches tall. It has four wheels, two seats, a steering wheel, working LED headlights and a powered dump bed. The recalled trucks have date codes from 15623 to 18724 printed on a label under the body of the truck. The date code's last two numbers are for the year and the first three numbers are for the day of the year; so, for example, the date code 15623 represents June 5, 2023, and date code 18724 represents July 5, 2024.
recalls.Title: Huffy Recalls Children's Ride-On Tonka Dump Trucks Due to Fire and Burn Hazards
recalls.ConsumerContact: Huffy at 800-872-2453 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET Monday through Friday, by email at service@huffy.com, or online at https://www.huffy.com/tonka-ride-on-toy-recall or at www.huffy.com and click on "Recall Notices" at the top of the page for more information.

Products.Name: Huffy 12-Volt Children's Ride-On Tonka Dump Trucks

Images.Caption: Recalled Huffy 12-volt Children's Ride-On Tonka Dump Truck

Injuries.Name: Huffy has received three reports of the controller overheating, and one report of a fire that consumed the ride-on truck. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Target and Sam's Club stores nationwide and online at www.target.com and www.samsclub.com from June 2023 through March 2025 for about $300.

Hazards.Name: The controller on the recalled ride-on dump trucks can overheat, posing fire and burn hazards.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled children's dump trucks and contact Huffy for a free replacement controller. Huffy is contacting all known purchasers directly.
